questions.clue: Diamonds are so colorless, I prefer these gems for my rings

Geographic name for the dessert seen here (chocolate cake with cherries)
Italian for "recooked", it's the key ingredient in the creamiest cheesecake

final.clue: The Silver Seraph, the 9th new model in its 92-year history, is its first built on a moving assembly line
